references.reason: A veranda table makes fan cues, shared servings, and protected conversational space visible.
Fan cue cards teach the difference between inviting a story, serving a course, and respecting a stopped boundary.
A shared tray makes Youmu's finite kitchen cadence and Yuyuko's hosting responsibility actionable.
The banquet handoff balances stories and courses with clear, assisted, and loss-continuing returns.
The opening observation records appetite as hosting intelligence rather than a single food-vacuum joke.
